microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end program delivery** for Azure's recovery validation portfolio, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise deployments with Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and gave distributed field and engineering teams a repeatable, structured deployment execution model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing program, delivering a rack-level drill in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable readiness-review process before go-live commitments were made to customers.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, coordinating engineering, operations, and hardware teams across concurrent programs — including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.

Built and maintained structured issue logs, escalation paths, and resolution timelines across all active programs, ensuring risks were identified and routed to owners before becoming **customer-facing misses** across a portfolio of simultaneous deployments.

Scaled team leverage through **AI-driven automation**, deploying an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — documenting the resulting playbooks for repeatable cross-deployment use.
microsoft_2023: Drove **customer program adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting live demos and structured onboarding sessions that activated 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through repeatable, self-service execution.

Closed critical feature gaps by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, translating field feedback and configuration friction into structured product requirements that directly influenced the **roadmap** to include intent-based YAML generation.

Improved deployment readiness and data integrity by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and enabling faster cross-team access to critical program artifacts.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch timelines by 28% by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework — coordinating scope, dependencies, and delivery commitments across 140+ teams without senior escalation.

Captured and translated field learnings into a structured deployment roadmap by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch and scoping automation investments to protect engineering capacity and customer commitments.

Enabled leadership to surface deployment risks early and prioritize high-impact process improvements by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil and milestone status across 140+ teams in a single, real-time program view.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping hardware and software dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating field readiness reviews before each go-live phase.

Coordinated delivery across IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, driving cross-functional alignment on scope and sequencing without formal authority and accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25%.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, maintaining a structured issue log to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and keep concurrent deployment workstreams on schedule.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and delivery lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals — building a CRM workflow that tracked scope changes, protected margin, and ensured customer commitments were clearly defined before work began.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and improved conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search presence to align customer-facing messaging with real service capabilities and field delivery capacity.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, translating field execution data into structured input for leadership pricing models — creating a feedback loop between on-site outcomes and operational planning.

skills_priority: AI agents, workflow automation, LLM-powered tools
